title: thelypteris pseudostenobasis
intro: Thelypteris pseudostenobasis, also known as the Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris pseudostenobasis include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris pseudostenobasis typically involve drying and processing the plant material into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
